title: Tasks
description: Tasks are the to-dos that you and your users have to complete. You can set reminders for tasks that need your attention. Reminders help you stay organized by alerting you about due or upcoming tasks.

owner_id.description: ID of the owner of the task.

owner_ids.description: Comma separated list of owner IDs of the task.

owner_name.description: Name of the owner of the task.

owners.description: List of owners of the task.

owner_mail.description: Email of the owner of the task.

photo_url.description: URL of the photo of the owner of the task.

due_date_formatted.description: Formatted due date of the task.

is_overdue.description: Indicates whether the task is overdue.

contact_type.description: Type of the contact associated with the task. Allowed values are customer and vendor

contact_id.description: ID of the contact associated with the task.

contact_name.description: Name of the contact associated with the task.

related_entity_id.description: ID of the related entity associated with the task.

related_entity_type.description: Type of the related entity associated with the task.

related_entity.description: Unique value assigned to each entity.

related_entity_value.description: Value of the related entity associated with the task.

custom_status_id.description: ID of the custom status of the task.

is_billable.description: Indicates whether the task is billable.

is_subtask.description: Indicates whether the task is a subtask.

priority.description: Priority of the task. Allowed values are normal, low, high, lowest and highest

reminder.description: Details of the reminder set for the task.

remind_before.description: Number of days, months or years before the task due date to send a reminder.

remind_at.description: Specific date to send the reminder.

remind_at_formatted.description: Formatted date to send the reminder.

remind_type.description: Type of reminder which can be days, months or years.

remind_type_formatted.description: Formatted type of reminder which can be days, months or years.

alert_type.description: Type of alert for the reminder.

alert_type_formatted.description: Formatted type of alert for the reminder.

send_email_notification.description: Indicates whether to send email notification for the task.

mail_id.description: Email ID to which the notification has to be sent.

email_account_type.description: Email account type to which the notification has to be sent.

email_folder_id.description: Folder ID of the email account to which the notification has to be sent.

email_account_id.description: Email account ID to which the notification has to be sent.

mail_attachments.description: List of attachments to be sent along with the email notification.

attachment_id.description: ID of the attachment to be sent along with the email notification.

file_name.description: Name of the file attached to the email notification.

is_sub_task.description: Indicates whether the task is a sub task.

subtask_count.description: Number of subtasks under the task.

related_sub_entity_id.description: ID of the related sub entity associated with the task.

related_sub_entity_type.description: Type of the related sub entity associated with the task.

client_id.description: ID of the client associated with the task.

client_name.description: Name of the client associated with the task.

task_description.example: This is a sample task description.

is_accountant_task.description: Indicates whether the task is an accountant task.

task_number.description: Unique number assigned to the task.

can_push.description: Indicates if the task can be sync to client

created_by_id.description: ID of the user who created the task.

last_modified_by_id.description: ID of the user who last modified the task.

created_time_formatted.description: Formatted creation time of the task.

template_id.description: ID of the template used for the task.

due_after.description: Number of days after which the task is due.

created_by_name.description: Name of the user who created the task.

can_show_in_portal.description: Indicates whether the document can be shown in the customer portal.

file_name.description: Name of the file attached to the task.

file_type.description: Type of the file attached to the task.

file_size.description: Size of the file attached to the task in bytes.

file_size_formatted.description: Formatted size of the file attached to the task.

document_id.description: ID of the document attached to the task.

attachment_order.description: Order of the attachment in the task.

document.description: Details of the document attached to the task.

documents.description: List of files attached to a particular task.

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields associated with the task

customfield_id.description: Unique identifier of the custom field

edit_on_store.description: Whether the custom field can be edited on store

show_in_all_pdf.description: Whether to show this custom field in all PDF documents

search_entity.description: Entity type to search when this is a lookup field

value.description: Value of the custom field, could be of any data type

value_formatted.description: Formatted string representation of the value

show_in_store.description: Whether to show this custom field in store

is_active.description: Whether the custom field is active

order.description: Display order of the custom field

label.description: Display name of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the custom field

is_dependent_field.description: Whether the custom field depends on another field

show_in_portal.description: Whether to show this custom field in the customer portal

show_on_pdf.description: Whether to show this custom field in PDF documents

edit_on_portal.description: Whether the custom field can be edited on the customer portal

statuses.description: List of statuses for the task.

is_system_task.description: Indicates whether the task is a system task.

comment_id.description: ID of the comment on the task.

commented_by_id.description: ID of the user who commented on the task.

commented_by.description: Name of the user who commented on the task.

date_description.description: Description of the date when the comment was made.

time.description: Time when the comment was made.

operation_type.description: Type of operation performed on the task.

transaction_id.description: ID of the transaction associated with the task.

transaction_type.description: Type of transaction associated with the task.

date.description: Date when the comment was made.

comments.description: List of comments for the task.

date.description: Date when the comment was made.

entity_tags.description: List of tags associated with the task.

dependencies.description: List of dependencies for the task.

depends_on_id.description: ID of the entity on which the current task depends.

depends_on_entity_type.description: Type of the entity on which the current task depends.

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields associated with the task

value_formatted.description: Formatted value of the custom field.

entity_tags.description: List of tags to be associated with the task.

update-tasks-request.description: List of tasks to be updated.

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields associated with the task

value_formatted.description: Formatted value of the custom field.

entity_tags.description: List of tags to be associated with the task.

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields associated with the task

value_formatted.description: Formatted value of the custom field.

entity_tags.description: List of tags to be associated with the task.
